positive: A majestic bioluminescent forest scene, stylized and rendered as a high-contrast silhouette illustration. Central composition featuring stylized, enormous flora (mushrooms, ferns, and towering stylized trees) illuminated by glowing, cosmic elements. The palette should primarily use deep indigo, vivid cyan, electric magenta, and matte black for maximum contrast. Incorporate geometric patterns and ornate linework inspired by Art Nouveau and psychedelic aesthetics. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, intricate detail, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
